action_boundary: Should demo transaction S7-TX-001 execute for counterparty C7-A?
communication_boundary: Relationship clearance and transaction-type clearance are separate.

documents.text: This source record is synthetic and fictional. It contains no real customer, worker, vendor, bank, security, payment, logistics, public-benefits, legal, or operational data.
Demo request S7-001 asks to execute an advisory-fee payment for counterparty C7-A.
Relationship clearance REL-S7-001 covers counterparty C7-A for 2026.
Transaction-type clearance TYPE-S7-001 names advisory-fee payments for C7-A through 2026-12-31.
Destination record DEST-S7-001 binds C7-A to synthetic account 3910.
The requested action requires relationship clearance and transaction-type clearance covering the same action.
